personality.description: Reviewer role and voice from REVIEWER_PERSONALITY_FILE.

pr_metadata.description: GitHub PR metadata. Each field is independently configurable. The description is included by default as the author's claims to verify against the diff (claim/code mismatches are review findings); set include_description to false for a blinded review.
pr_metadata.example:
Title: Fix SpacetimeDB WebSocket protocol on HTTPS pages
Author: asavschaeffer
URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/97
Base: main
Head: fix/wss
Head SHA: abc123

commit_subjects.description: The author's commit subject lines from the GitHub commits API, framed as claims to verify against the diff. The snapshot tarball has no .git, so commit narrative only reaches Gemini through this segment. Disable for a blinded review.
commit_subjects.example:
- Fix WebSocket protocol detection on HTTPS pages
- Add regression test for wss fallback

ci_status.description: Gate state plus the GitHub check-run results for this head SHA, so the reviewer sees what automation already verified instead of taking the author's word for it. Failing or pending required checks still block review before Gemini is called.
ci_status.example:
Required GitHub Actions checks passed for this PR head. GitHub check runs for this commit (name, status, conclusion):
unit-tests	completed	success

previous_bot_review.description: The bot's most recent prior GitHub review on the same PR, excluding the current head SHA. This lets Gemini check whether earlier concerns were addressed before changing verdicts.
previous_bot_review.example:
Previous commit: abc123
Previous review event: REQUEST_CHANGES
Review body:
[P1] Fix the unsafe fallback before merge.

source_snapshot_hint.description: Tells Gemini where the untrusted PR-head source snapshot is mounted and that repo-relative paths in the prompt resolve under it. Without this the snapshot is hard to discover, because Gemini's working directory is intentionally empty.
source_snapshot_hint.example: The PR-head source tree is mounted read-only at: /run/user/1000/goobreview-runtime/worktrees/owner__repo/current

diff.description: Changed-file index plus the untrusted PR diff, assembled per file from the GitHub files API. Whole files over the per-file or total budget, files GitHub serves no text patch for, built-in lockfile/minified patterns, and whatever the target repo marks linguist-generated in its .gitattributes are replaced with a marked omission instead of being cut mid-hunk; omitted files stay readable in the source snapshot. This segment should almost always stay enabled.
diff.example:
Changed files:
M client/src/environment.ts (+1/-0)
M package-lock.json (+3801/-2950)

diff --git a/client/src/environment.ts b/client/src/environment.ts
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
diff --git a/package-lock.json b/package-lock.json
[goobreview: patch omitted (matches omit pattern package-lock.json); status modified, +3801/-2950]

response_format.description: Machine-readable review event and human-readable review body contract.
